sentences.text: to the James Dorn Company and the Humanities Foundation. If you know your party's extension, you may enter it now. Or select from the following options. For the dial by name directory, dial one. Residents of one of the properties managed by the James Dorine management company, dial two. If you are interested in our Shelter Net Program, which provides rental and utility assistance services, dial three. For marketplace, dial four. For the H. R. Department, dial five. For property development, dial six. For the accounts payable department, dial seven. And to speak to our receptionist, dial zero, we have not received a valid response. Please wait while we connect your call. Welcome to James Door Company and the Humanities Foundation. If you know your party's extension, you may enter it now or select from the following options for the dial by name directory. If you are a resident of one of the properties managed by the James Dorine Management Company, dial two. If you are interested in our Shelter Net Program which provides rental and utility assistance services, dial three. For marketplace, dial four. For the H. R department, dial five. For property developer. If you need to hear these options again, please press
star. Otherwise you'll be transferred to the receptionist The person at extension one
